zh.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell是Gilbert de Meinell的兒子，於大約1070年出生在英國德比夏爾柯克 明日香。他於1099年與Gertrude Fossard在英國越可爾素斯 奧特林頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1166年在英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell是Gilbert de Meinell的儿子，于大约1070年出生在英国德比夏爾柯克 明日香。他于1099年与Gertrude Fossard在英国越可爾素斯 奧特林頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1166年在英国英格兰越可爾爾頓享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meinell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German Meixl or Meixel: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with mag- ‘strength’ or māg ‘kinsman’ as the first element.

variants.name: Meixsell
meanings: Variant of   Meixell  , a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Mikesell
meanings: History: Andreas Meixel or Meissel came to Lancaster County, PA, c. 1715from Leimen, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell was born about 1070, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England as the son of Gilbert de Meinell. He married Gertrude Fossard in 1099, in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1166, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell est né environ 1070, à Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fils de Gilbert de Meinell. Il a épousé Gertrude Fossard en 1099, à South Otterington, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1166, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell wurde um 1070 in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, als Sohn von Gilbert de Meinell geboren. Er hat 1099 in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England Gertrude Fossard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1166 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell è nato il circa 1070 nel Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England come figlio di Gilbert de Meinell. Lui sposato Gertrude Fossard nel 1099, nel South Otterington, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1166, nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinellは約1070年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーでGilbert de Meinellの息子として生まれた。1099年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス オッテリントンでGertrude Fossardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1166年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell(은)는 대략 1070년 영국 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 Gilbert de Meinell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1099년 영국 요르크실르 소우스 오테링턴에서 Gertrude Fossard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 화를턴에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra filho de Gilbert de Meinell. Ele casou-se com Gertrude Fossard em 1099, em South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1166, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell родился около 1070 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия. Его отца звали Gilbert de Meinell. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude Fossard в 1099 г. в местности соут оттирингтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell nació aproximadamente 1070, en Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Gilbert de Meinell. Se casó con Gertrude Fossard en 1099, en South Otterington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1166, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años.
